since_last: 40% of 100 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +0.92%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: Markets closed for the weekend
cards.body: US equity markets are shut for the weekend, so the tape is frozen at the previous session's close. Everything below reflects that last close — not live trading — and refreshes when the market reopens.

cards.headline: Last close: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.42% · BTC -0.09% · Gold -0.64% · Nasdaq100 +0.33%. At the last close, 40% of 100 AI names were green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware did the heavy lifting at +0.92%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +0.92%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -3.50%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +12.76%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +12.76%, META +5.97%, NVDA +4.03%, UEC +3.64%, CSCO +2.54%. Laggards: OKTA -6.86%, MDB -5.73%, CRWD -5.66%, ZS -5.34%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.51% at $145.3
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.51% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
